cases.prompt: keepass vault 에서 API 키 자동 inject 해줘

assertions.text: It checks the KeePassXC vault status including the vault path and CLI presence.
It prompts once for the master password and then injects the known entries for the current session.
It maps known KeePassXC entries (Zotero, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, GitHub) to their corresponding environment variables.
It keeps the master password in current session memory only and never saves it to disk or environment.

cases.prompt: run simonk-keepass-inject so my Anthropic key is available in this session

assertions.text: It diagnoses which expected environment variables are set versus missing after injection.
It injects ANTHROPIC_API_KEY into the current process scope so child processes like claude inherit it.
It notes that the injection applies only to the current session and must be re-run once per new session.
